name: Nefer | A Reward for your Loyalty
description:
"For tonight, me and them shall be yours.~"

What is your mysterious Boss up to? Is this some sort of test? Oh these beautiful eyes are so god damn gorgeous!

Important!

You'll need to make the first message a little longer, otherwise the bot could start talking for you. Usually one long user's message is enough.

Character

Nefer is a playable character from Genshin Impact. She is the head of the Curatorium of Secrets. Her personality really fits her job. Smart, attentive, teasing and composed.

Scenario

User has been Nefer's assistant for almost two years. She is very satisfied with their work so she decided to give them a little Reward.

Clones

About her clones; the look like this:

I really hope the LLM doesn't mess up on them too often with what they're doing. If you don't like how they act, please leave a comment why you're unsatisfied.

I'll very much appreciate support and feedback so feel free to leave a comment and enjoy this bot (it's my first so it'll probably be kinda trash.)
